title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
summary: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

title: Chip Stocks Fall to Bear-Market Brink in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, sending the group that has led this year’s stock rally to the edge of a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.

title: US Oil Rig Count Notches Longest Streak Without Drop Since 2022
summary: Drilling in the US oil patch achieved the longest stretch without a decrease in activity in more than four years, supporting shale’s expansion amid higher prices driven by the Iran war.
